title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A panel discussion by Google DeepMind reflecting on the 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo's victory over Lee Sedol in 2016. The discussion frames AlphaGo as a foundational turning point that sparked the modern AI revolution, with impacts on algorithmic discovery and scientific challenges like protein folding.
